coreMetrics.name: Process Completion Rate
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of defined processes completed on time each cycle

coreMetrics.name: SOP Coverage
coreMetrics.description: Percentage of recurring tasks that have a documented SOP

coreMetrics.name: Bottleneck Resolution Time
coreMetrics.description: Average time to identify and resolve operational bottlenecks

coreMetrics.name: Operational Cost Ratio
coreMetrics.description: Operational costs as a percentage of revenue

weeklyRhythm.activity: Standup and priorities — align team on weekly deliverables and blockers
Process review — identify what broke or slowed down this week

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: List of outdated or missing SOPs with update assignments
Top 3 bottlenecks identified with resolution plans
Tool usage and cost audit with consolidation recommendations
Resource allocation review and next month hiring or contractor needs

whatToDelegate.when: Once processes are proven and stable
